title: PARENTING SUPPORT - 211info
text: COLONIA AMISTAD PARENTING SUPPORT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides parenting support such as community cafes, the Casa Infantil Project, Strengthening Families Parenting Classes, advocacy, diapers, baby formula, and other baby items. 30 S Gun Club Road Independence, OR 97351 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday noon-6pm Email (503) 838-0689 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 838-0689 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for an appointment. Walk-ins may be accepted on a case-by-case basis. FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties Services: Diapers Formula/Baby Food Parenting Skills Classes Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY WELLNESS PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - POSITIVE YOUTH DEVELOPMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COLONIA AMISTAD
